programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Michael is about to go on his first date, but Ben's plans to give him 'the big talk' are doomed when Nick offers his own advice first. Meanwhile, Susan fails to understand the importance of Prada jeans in Janey's life.

programme.title: Shetland
programme.desc: Perez tries to get the measure of Lloyd. Evidence emerges of another bombmaker. The net closes in around Martin. Sandy uncovers Connor's interest in a piece of local history.

programme.title: Elementary
programme.desc: Holmes returns to New York with a new apprentice and a renewed interest in working with the NYPD after being fired by London's MI6. Unfortunately, Joan, the NYPD's new go-to PI, must give her approval first.

programme.title: ER
programme.desc: Going into harm's way, Carter returns to the Congo to search for Luka's body despite the chaos and danger of a civil war. Taken prisoner by rebel troops, Luka's fate is revealed from the time Carter left 22 days earlier.

programme.title: Like A Version - triple j
programme.desc: Gigi Perez covers Lana Del Rey's 'Summertime Sadness' for Like A Version.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Joining QI master Stephen Fry are Phill Jupitus, Jo Brand, Jessica Stevenson and Alan Davies. This episode is themed around domesticity and the panellists' buzzers are all domestic noises. (Final).

programme.title: Would I Lie To You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the comedy panel show. Joining team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are David Baddiel, Ed Balls, Jo Brand and Kimberly Wyatt.

programme.title: Mythbusters
programme.desc: If a single car brakes lightly, can it cause a ripple that triggers a major traffic jam? Is it better to stay in one lane in heavy traffic instead of changing lanes? Are roundabouts more efficient than four-way stop signs?

programme.title: Phil Spencer: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Jason and Maya Lawie have been trying to sell their home for seven months, and move from Niddrie in Edinburgh to Lancashire. They're a creative couple but this could be exactly what is putting buyers off their home.

programme.title: Grand Designs UK
programme.desc: Plumber Jon Martin and ceramicist Noreen Jaafar build a modern tree house in their home town Gloucestershire. It proves an epic undertaking as their ambitious design comes to life 40 feet up in the canopy.

programme.title: Claire Hooper's House Of Games
programme.desc: Staying over at Claire Hooper's House of Games this week, we've got actor Gyton Grantley, netballer Bianca Chatfield, and comedians Jenny Tian and Nazeem Hussain solving puzzles to earn a toilet seat and also a trophy.

programme.title: Spicks and Specks
programme.sub-title: Ali Mcgregor, Richard Gottehrer, Shane Jacobson & Russell Howard
programme.desc: Joining Adam Hills are Ali McGregor, Richard Gottehrer, Shane Jacobson and Russell Howard.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Quiz show in which the aim is to be interesting. Stephen Fry goes looking for monsters with Sara Pascoe, Josh Widdicombe, Phill Jupitus and Alan Davies.

programme.title: Would I Lie To You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the award-winning comedy panel show. Team captains Lee Mack and David Mitchell are joined by guest panellists Richie Anderson, Taj Atwal, Chris McCausland and Katherine Parkinson.

programme.title: Small Town Scandal
programme.desc: With his own legal trouble mounting, Toby must clear his and his dad's names, finish his podcast, deal with a serial killer, navigate the town fair, and solve Uncle Mitch's murder. (Final).

programme.title: Bad Company
programme.desc: Julia is determined to get The Argyle on track with performance reviews, creating chaos as Margie's new play is about to open. Meanwhile Julia's son Ryan wanders the halls, catching Margie's eye.

programme.title: Elementary
programme.desc: When Holmes and Watson join forces on a double homicide, Sherlock's new apprentice, Kitty, threatens the investigation when she allows her jealousy of Sherlock and Joan's work rapport to override her better judgment.

programme.title: ER
programme.desc: Abby receives a special \.

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Michael is about to go on his first date, but Ben's plans to give him 'the big talk' are doomed when Nick offers his own advice first. Meanwhile, Susan fails to understand the importance of Prada jeans in Janey's life.

programme.title: Rage Special
programme.desc: From Eric Prydz to Dirty Projectors, Dua Lipa, Olivia Newton-John, Luke Million and more, rage lines up the sweatiest sportiest music videos in the collection.

programme.title: Breeders
programme.desc: Jim and Jackie are both struggling under their new circumstances. Luke has a choice to make, and Ally meets someone new.

programme.title: Breeders
programme.desc: A furious argument between Paul and Ally is interrupted by Ava’s news about Jim. Luke is happier than ever, a newly confident Ava stands up to her dad, but Paul and Ally need to decide—is this it?

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Nicky, a seasoned master of misdirection, becomes romantically involved with novice con artist Jess. As he's teaching her the tricks of the trade, she gets too close for comfort and he abruptly breaks it off. Three years later, the former flame, now an accomplished femme fatale, shows up in Buenos Aires in the middle of the high-stakes race car circuit. In the midst of Nicky's latest, very dangerous scheme, she throws his plans for a loop and the consummate con man off his game.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig goes to university with Guz Khan, Joe Lycett, Morgana Robinson and Alan Davies.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Joining QI master Stephen Fry are Phill Jupitus, Jo Brand, Jessica Stevenson and Alan Davies. This episode is themed around domesticity and the panellists' buzzers are all domestic noises. (Final).

programme.title: Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: The Jedi put their flying skills to the test.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series
programme.sub-title: Afterlifestyles Of The Rich And Mavis
programme.desc: Mavis arranges a special celebration for Frankenstein and Eunice's 97th anniver-scary, but before the big dinner, she accidentally loses Frank's body leaving him as just a head.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series
programme.desc: The wolf pups are out of control and Aunt Lydia puts Klaus in charge of caring for them. And he does such a good job that he is charged with babysitting Mavis and the gang too!

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Concert Catastrophe
programme.desc: Maudie is crushed when her tickets to a pop concert go missing, especially since it seems likely that she herself has misplaced them.

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Soccer Saga
programme.desc: Kyle asks Maudie and Ava to make a video of his soccer match but Maudie discovers something about the game is not quite right.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir
programme.desc: When Chloe sabotages a famous chef's dish, he gets akumatized into Kung Food and anyone who tastes his soup falls under his control.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir
programme.desc: When Max loses a challenge at a video game tournament, he gets akumatized into the Gamer and unleashes a giant robot onto Paris.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: It's Movie Night and the Titans have a hard time deciding who gets to choose which movie they watch.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Bitzer, Shaun and Flock are convinced that a monster is at loose on the farm and hide in the barn. But what exactly is it they are afraid of?

programme.title: Scooby-Doo and Guess Who?
programme.desc: Malcolm McDowell takes the gang on a trip through time.

programme.title: We Baby Bears
programme.desc: After Grizz, Panda and Ice Bear receive a special box, the brothers discover its magical ability to transport them anywhere in the universe.

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: The Professor makes new friends, but they may be the wrong crowd.

programme.title: Open Season: Call Of Nature
programme.sub-title: Close Encounters Of The Nutty Kind
programme.desc: Best friends Boog, a lovable, risk-averse grizzly bear, and Elliot, a fast-talking, \.

programme.title: Summer Camp Island
programme.desc: While Oscar helps Hedgehog find her wand, Susie tries to convince the Meeting of the Minds that Hedgehog isn’t responsible enough for magic.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Darwin has promised to play video games with Gumball but his promise with Banana Joe interferes.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin tries to tell some tall tales, but the other Titans give their own fractured versions instead.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Brother Blood takes the Titans to trial for their destruction.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir
programme.desc: Ladybug has lost the Miracle Box. Monarch has never been so close to victory. But our heroes will prove to be more united than ever. This new trial will mark them for life.

programme.title: This Spells Disaster
programme.desc: The gang is planning a surprise for Puppycorn, so they spell things out when talking so he won't find out. Desperate to know what they're saying, Puppycorn finds a magic book that he thinks will help him learn to spell… but unbeknownst to him, it's teaching him how to cast spells! Will Puppycorn realize that knowledge is power... and some secrets are kept for a reason?

programme.title: Pokemon Horizons: The Series
programme.desc: Liko and Meowscarada face off against a fellow Nidothing fan who really loves Litten.

programme.title: Gg: Spawn Squad
programme.sub-title: Jess Builds a Dream Room for KK Slider!
programme.desc: Jess and Gem take a first look at the latest Animal Crossing: New Horizons update! With their combined decorating skills, will Gem and Jess be able to impress the hotel's latest guest - the world famous rockstar KK Slider?

programme.title: Dance With Tom
programme.desc: Tom teaches a Mungera dance. Mungera is the Yugambeh word for Gumtree. The Gumtree is home to many birds and animals and keeps them safe. Join Tom in a Mungera dance to be strong and remember to feel good protecting others!

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.sub-title: All the Numbers I Can Be
programme.desc: One is in awe of how many numbers One Hundred has inside - but exactly how many are there? One Hundred takes her on a journey to find out.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.sub-title: Orchid's Almost Half Hour Talent Show
programme.desc: All the agents want to be a part of Orchid’s talent show.

programme.title: Our Animals
programme.desc: They might look cute, but wombats are tough animals with strong sturdy legs and thick skin.

programme.title: Operation Ouch!
programme.desc: A world champion whistler pops in to help the doctors whistle - and even Billy Bones joins in!

programme.title: Horrible Science
programme.desc: Big Danny and Big Manny find science shocking, Da Vinci does a sound experiment, Newton rides again, Queen Vic shows off & Dr Big Brain doesn't see the attraction of electromagnets!

programme.title: Burps, Butts and Bones
programme.desc: Grace from the B Squad helps a few furry clients with dental care while learning how similar they are to our teeth and why it's so important to take good care of them.

programme.title: Body Systems
programme.desc: The circulatory system, also known as the cardiovascular system, keeps blood pumping and flowing throughout our bodies, delivering important nutrients and oxygen.

programme.title: Know It Alls: Science
programme.desc: An electrifying fact-finding mission through Questacon, the National Science and Technology Centre with comedian Lauren Bonner and young Emma as they find shockingly cool facts for the ultimate quiz.

programme.title: BtN Newsbreak
programme.desc: Find out what's going on in the world with a news bulletin designed for children, featuring stories that are relevant and easy to understand.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Jason and Maya Lawie have been trying to sell their home for seven months, and move from Niddrie in Edinburgh to Lancashire. They're a creative couple but this could be exactly what is putting buyers off their home.

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Ben is rushed to hospital after turning white and is forced to reveal that he took Viagra. Placed on a low-carb diet, he turns to Brigitte's guru for help. Meanwhile, Susan's yoga teacher has fallen out with her husband.

programme.title: Shetland
programme.desc: The team races to identify the killer and prevent disaster striking Lerwick. As the investigation draws to a close, Perez faces a life-changing decision.

programme.title: Elementary
programme.desc: When Holmes and Watson join forces on a double homicide, Sherlock's new apprentice, Kitty, threatens the investigation when she allows her jealousy of Sherlock and Joan's work rapport to override her better judgment.

programme.title: ER
programme.desc: Abby deals with her fellow nurses threatening a walkout, new residents on the staff and an unexpected letter from Carter; new doctor Coop is almost killed by a fellow colleague; Pratt and Chen's relationship hits a crossroads; Romano gets a hook.

programme.title: Like A Version - triple j
programme.desc: triple j's legendary Like A Version segment hosts the greatest local and international acts, performing a cover of a song they love, and one of their own.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Stephen Fry asks questions on the subject of Humans with guests Jo Brand, Jimmy Carr, Jack Dee and the ever-present Alan Davies.

programme.title: Would I Lie To You?
programme.sub-title: Shirley Ballas, Steven Bartlett, Josie Gibson And Chris Mccausland
programme.desc: Rob Brydon is back in the host's chair, with Lee Mack and David Mitchell returning as team captains. Sorting the fact from the fiction this week are guests Shirley Ballas, Steven Bartlett, Josie Gibson and Chris McCausland.

programme.title: Mythbusters
programme.desc: The MythBusters get down and dirty to test if using a bathroom's hand dryer is better than a paper towel and which public restroom stall is the cleanest. They also shake, rattle and roll to test if it's better to stand in the doorway during an earthquake.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: Secret Agent
programme.desc: In Staffordshire, Phil hopes to help Mark and Denise James find a buyer for their three bed semi. But Phil discovers a house full of clutter, a bathroom that's seen better days and a huge garden complete with cows. (Final).

programme.title: Grand Designs UK
programme.desc: Matt and Sophie White from Sussex want to build a giant house of fun for themselves and their three children, with secret stairs, hiding places and a fireman's pole. But Matt keeps changing the design.

programme.title: Claire Hooper's House Of Games
programme.desc: Staying over at Claire Hooper's House of Games this week, we've got actor Gyton Grantley, netballer Bianca Chatfield, and comedians Jenny Tian and Nazeem Hussain solving puzzles to earn a toilet seat and also a trophy.

programme.title: Spicks and Specks
programme.sub-title: Lara Goodridge, Brian Canham, Wilbur Wilde & Hamish Blake
programme.desc: Joining Adam Hills are Lara Goodridge, Brian Canham, Wilbur Wilde and Hamish Blake.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig invites Jason Manford, Sara Pascoe, Jeremy Clarkson and Alan Davies to answer questions on the subject of 'noble rot'.

programme.title: Would I Lie To You?
programme.sub-title: Kevin Bishop, Brian Blessed, Josh Widdicombe And Kate Williams
programme.desc: The award-winning comedy panel show, hosted by Rob Brydon, features team captains Lee Mack and David Mitchell joined by a lively guest line-up. Actor and comedian Kevin Bishop, legendary actor Brian Blessed OBE, stand-up star Josh Widdicombe, and historian Professor Kate Williams all take part, sharing tall tales, quick wit, and outrageous bluffs.

programme.title: Beyond Paradise
programme.desc: A new adventure awaits as DI Humphrey Goodman and Martha leave London for Devon. Humphrey dives into his first case, which involves an unusual prime suspect: a 17th-century witch.

programme.title: Elementary
programme.desc: Sherlock helps a math genius from his network of \.

programme.title: ER
programme.desc: During the graveyard shift, Pratt treats a man who has lost the power of speech and a boy who has swallowed a quarter. Elsewhere, Abby has a frosty meeting with her ex-husband, while Elizabeth starts warming up to Dr. Dorset.

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Ben is rushed to hospital after turning white and is forced to reveal that he took Viagra. Placed on a low-carb diet, he turns to Brigitte's guru for help. Meanwhile, Susan's yoga teacher has fallen out with her husband.

programme.title: Rage Vault
programme.desc: From Bon Jovi to Iron Maiden, Poison, David Lee Roth, Siouxsie and The Banshees and more, rage dives into the Vault to bring you the best rock and metal clips from 1986.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Quiz show in which contestants are rewarded more if their answers are 'quite interesting'. Host Stephen Fry endearingly embodies 'Empire' with Bill Bailey, Jo Brand, Sean Lock and Alan Davies.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Stephen Fry goes decidedly kitsch with Sue Perkins, Reginald D Hunter and Jimmy Carr.

programme.title: The Outlaws
programme.desc: A few months on, the outlaws still have time to serve on their sentences. But they discover the criminal underworld isn't done with them yet. Thrown out by her parents, Rani pitches up at Christian's.

programme.title: Live At The Apollo
programme.desc: The fabulous Mo Gilligan introduces comedians Laura Smyth and Josh Pugh to the stage.

programme.title: ABC News Update
programme.desc: The headlines from ABC News, updating you on the day's top stories from across Australia and around the world.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Stephen Fry asks questions on the subject of Humans with guests Jo Brand, Jimmy Carr, Jack Dee and the ever-present Alan Davies.

programme.title: Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: Kai and friends defend the forest creatures’ homes.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series
programme.desc: In order to avoid another bad review, Mavis is bending over backwards to please guests, leading her to rent out the Cartwright house to ghosts looking for a 'human experience'.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series
programme.desc: Mavis and the gang watch a Hotel Pennsylvania Halloween marathon, but when Pedro works a little candy magic on their remote, Mavis goes poof and winds up -inside the TV!

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Puzzling Pet Day
programme.desc: When the Animal Shelter visits school to audition kids for a television commercial, Maudie suspects a crime is happening right under everyone's noses.

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Copy Cat
programme.desc: Ava is selected to deliver a speech at the town hall, but when she is accused of stealing it, Maudie must prove her innocence.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir
programme.desc: When Juleka is excluded from the class picture, she is akumatized into Reflekta and threatens to turn everyone into a reflection of herself.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir
programme.desc: After an argument with Ladybug, Chloé gets akumatized and turns into Antibug, meaning Ladybug will have to fight an opponent with the same powers as her.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: It's back to school as the Titans teach each other about science and grammar.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: When Timmy sees a particularly grumpy farmer giving one of the flock a hard time, he decides to give him an idea of what it's like to be a sheep.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo and Guess Who?
programme.sub-title: I Put A Hex On You!
programme.desc: The Hex Girls need Mystery, Inc. for a cursed guitar.

programme.title: We Baby Bears
programme.desc: Three baby bear brothers are granted a magical box that can transport them to any place in the universe.

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: Bubbles and Buttercup make a deal without realizing the consequences.

programme.title: Open Season: Call Of Nature
programme.desc: Elliot gets the idea of launching a Camp Radio Station. Soon the various campers are taking up slots to broadcast their own shows, and chatty, spontaneous blabbermouth Elliot discovers he has a natural talent for being a DJ.

programme.title: Summer Camp Island
programme.desc: Lucy's suspicious behaviour prompts Oscar and Hedgehog to investigate whether or not she's the kingpin of a secret society.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Richard is left in charge for the day, but his lack of rules attracts unwanted guests to the Watterson house.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.sub-title: How's This for a Special? Spaaaace Part: 1
programme.desc: After receiving a galactic crime alert the Titans take off for an epic space adventure.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: The Titans' Halloween party is interrupted by the Hive Five robbing a candy factory.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir
programme.desc: Sorry to see their holders unlucky in love, Tikki and Plagg have made a drastic noise which is changing many a thing in Paris.for better and for worse.

programme.title: Roadtrip Ruckus
programme.desc: Richard has decided to take Unikitty and the gang for a pleasant and relaxing ten-hour road trip. At first everyone is against the trip, but they soon start to have fun.

programme.title: Pokemon Horizons: The Series
programme.desc: Liko and Roy reunite with one of their friends from the Rising Volt Tacklers.

programme.title: Gg: Spawn Squad
programme.desc: We're back with Sueann, Harry and Goodemon in Pokemon Legends: Z-A! In this first look at the DLC Goodemon explores the Mega Dimension, cooks some donuts and battles a few incredibly angry looking Mankeys!

programme.title: Dance With Tom
programme.desc: Tom Teaches a Kuruhman dance. Kuruhman is the Yugambeh word for Kangaroo, who are curious and listen very carefully to the sounds of the bush. Join Tom and learn to be strong and patient, just like the great Kuruhman!

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: The Numberblocks Space Division are investigating a signal - until a strange planet splits them into hundreds, tens and ones. How can they escape?

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: Can Alphablocks A and B race all the way around Alphaland before sunset?

programme.title: Gardening Australia Junior
programme.desc: Millie, Harper and Xavier, explore a garden to look for plants that survive and thrive in unusual places. They decide to turn dead logs and branches into mini gardens. It's a Log Pot Party!

programme.title: History Hunters
programme.desc: Meet a medieval estate agent with some fancy castles to sell and hear how knights' training was long and hard and how they wore family crests called coats of arms to stand out in battle.

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: How long does it take to build a pyramid? Why didn’t people like the Statue of Liberty? Why are there pineapples on St Paul’s? Horrible Histories takes a tour of the world’s greatest landmarks.

programme.title: Convict Kids
programme.desc: Convicts sent out to the penal colonies in Australia were expected to work as a part of their punishment, and convict kids were no exceptions. They also lived under the same harsh conditions as the adults.

programme.title: btn
programme.desc: BTN is a high-energy, fun way for Upper Primary and Secondary students to learn about current issues and events in their world. Each program is built around major news stories of the week.

programme.title: The Ancient World
programme.desc: Explores the rise and sudden fall of the Mayan Civilisation, their advancements in astronomy and mathematics, and the creation of the infamous Mayan calendar.

programme.title: BtN Newsbreak
programme.desc: Find out what's going on in the world with a news bulletin designed for children, featuring stories that are relevant and easy to understand.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: Secret Agent
programme.desc: In Staffordshire, Phil hopes to help Mark and Denise James find a buyer for their three bed semi. But Phil discovers a house full of clutter, a bathroom that's seen better days and a huge garden complete with cows. (Final).

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Desperation drives Susan to offer Nick a job at her tour company. Janey surprises everyone when her school wants to put her forward as an Oxbridge candidate, but Ben is not too impressed with her innovative study techniques.

programme.title: Shetland
programme.desc: A Met detective returns to Shetland on the trail of a vulnerable witness. DI Ruth Calder must team up with Tosh to find the girl before it's too late.

programme.title: Elementary
programme.desc: Sherlock helps a math genius from his network of \.
